title: Create Ghar Builder construction marketplace platform

requirements.text: Create a homepage that introduces Ghar Builder as a construction marketplace platform where users can find construction professionals and post construction projects

quotes: it is a constructiuon website like a guru .com it name is ghar builder

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage displays the Ghar Builder branding and explains the platform purpose
Clear call-to-action buttons for both posting projects and browsing professionals
Professional construction-themed visual design

requirements.text: Implement project posting functionality where users can create construction project listings with title, description, budget range, and project category (residential, commercial, renovation, etc.)

quotes: it is a constructiuon website like a guru .com

acceptanceCriteria: Form to create new project with all required fields
Projects are stored in backend and persist across sessions
Project categories include common construction types

requirements.text: Create a project browse/search page where users can view all posted construction projects with filtering by category and budget range

quotes: it is a constructiuon website like a guru .com

acceptanceCriteria: Display list of all projects with key details visible
Filter controls for category and budget range work correctly
Clicking a project shows full project details

requirements.text: Implement professional profile creation where construction professionals can create profiles with their name, specialty (contractor, architect, engineer, etc.), experience, and service description

quotes: it is a constructiuon website like a guru .com

acceptanceCriteria: Form to create professional profile with all fields
Profiles are stored in backend and linked to user identity
Specialty options cover common construction roles

requirements.text: Create a professionals directory page where users can browse and search construction professionals by specialty and filter by experience level

quotes: it is a constructiuon website like a guru .com

acceptanceCriteria: Display grid or list of professional profiles
Filter by specialty works correctly
Clicking a profile shows full professional details

requirements.text: Integrate Internet Identity authentication so users can sign in to post projects or create professional profiles
acceptanceCriteria: Login button triggers Internet Identity authentication
Authenticated users can access posting and profile features
Non-authenticated users can browse but not post

requirements.text: Design the interface with a construction-industry themed visual style that uses earthy warm tones (oranges, browns, yellows), bold typography suitable for a professional marketplace, and incorporates construction imagery and iconography throughout the interface
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses warm earthy tones consistently
Typography is bold and professional
Construction-related visual elements are present throughout
Overall aesthetic reflects the construction industry

nonGoals: Real-time messaging between users and professionals

required: Construction-themed hero banner showing building site or blueprints with warm color overlay (hero-construction.dim_1920x600.png)
Logo for Ghar Builder with construction tool or building iconography (ghar-builder-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Icon set for project categories: residential building, commercial building, renovation tools (category-icons.dim_512x512.png)
